text:
Instrument #20260174
Page 3 of 8

Said lands being further depicted on the plat of 4D Surveying, PLLC, dated
October 22, 2025, attached hereto as “Exhibit A”, and incorporated herein by
reference.

LESS AND EXCEPT:

Commencing at the Northwest corner of the SEM% of the NE% of Section 4,
Township 5 North, Range 18 West, Marion County, Mississippi, and thence
run East 460 feet and to the East right-of-way line of the Columbia to Mt.
Carmel Public Road; thence run in a Southerly direction along the East
right-of-way line of the Columbia to Mt. Carmel Public Road 420 feet;
thence run East 210 feet; thence run Northerly parallel with the East
right-of-way line of the Columbia to Mt. Carmel Public Road 420 feet, more
or less, to a point due East of the point of beginning; thence run West 210
feet to the point of beginning; being two (2) acres, more or less, situated in
the SE% of the NE% of Section 4, Township 5 North, Range 18 West,
Marion County, Mississippi.

TOGETHER WITH all improvements thereon situated and appurtenances
thereunto belonging.

LESS AND EXCEPT all oil, gas, and other minerals in, on, and under all of the lands
herein conveyed.
The aforesaid property is conveyed by the Grantor herein and accepted by the
Grantees herein subject to the following, to wit:
A. The ad valorem taxes for the current year which shall be prorated by and between
the Grantor and the Grantees as of the date hereof.
B. All governmental regulations and ordinances, including all zoning ordinances of

governmental entities.

C. All roadway and utility easements of record or in place.
